item.title: DESSINI ITALY 1.8L Electric Rice Cooker Non Stick Aluminium Inner Pot with Steamer Pengukus Periuk Nasi Elektrik

paragraph_list.text: Product Description:
- DESSINI 350W Electric Rice Cooker – 1.8L
- Model: PC-XB 18
- SIRIM certified, ensuring it meets Malaysia's strict safety, quality, and performance standards.
- Electric rice cooker gives you mouth-watering delicacies to satisfy your food cravings.
- Multi-functional cooking, steaming, stewing, boiling and reheating
- 2-way cooking at one time, allow cook and steam together
- Just place all ingredients in the pot, choose a setting and let your rice cooker do the work
- Cook in advance and keep your food warm until you’re ready to eat.
- Easy operation to cook perfectly
- Double safety anti dry protection with automatic power off function, making cooking more secure.
- Prevents food from overheating so your food won’t get burnt.
- Ease of use combined with energy saving technology
- Non-stick coating is ideal for cooking, easy to clean.
- Able to flip without any of it sticking to the surface.
- Distribute heat evenly and quickly resulting in faster and more uniform cooking
- Heat insulated handle design to ensure safe cooking and prevent user scalding during cooking time
- Inner pot diameter: 17cm
- Pot Capacity: 1.8L
- Rice Capacity: 0.5L
- Power: 350W
- Extra bubble wrap to your item to reduce the risk of item being damage or dented during shipment due to rough handling by the courier company.
Packaging Includes:
- 1 x DESSINI 1.8L electric rice cooker
- 1 x Measuring cup
- 1 x Spatula
- 1 x Steam tray
- 1 x Instruction manual (English version)

services.title: 15 Days Free Returns
services.description: Request for a free return within 15 days and get a full refund*. Applicable to selected items. Electronic Category products must remain SEALED (i.e., the seal is not broken, been tampered with, or altered). Exclusion Applied. View T&C here.

services.title: 100% Authentic
services.description: Shopee assures that all Shopee Mall products are 100% authentic. If youreceive non-authentic product from one of our authorized Shopee Mall sellers, Shopee will reimburse up to 8x the amount you paid for the product. Shop with confidence with our 100% Authenticity Guarantee.

services.title: Free Shipping
services.description: Enjoy Free Shipping with a minimum spend for products purchased from Shopee Mall with our Free Shipping vouchers.

services.title: Cash on Delivery
services.description:
1. Shopee offers Cash On Delivery (COD) in Malaysia for Doorstep Delivery or orders under RM250.
2. Your order will be assigned to Shopee Express, DHL eCommerce, or Ninjavan for delivery.
3. Pay cash to the courier upon parcel delivery.
4. Do note that the amount payable will be rounded to the nearest 5 cents.
5. A reminder to beware of fraudulent behaviors, you do not need to make any payments directly to seller for Cash On Delivery orders.

services.title: Electronic Protection Service Program
services.description: Exclusive membership for additional service packages & 12 months device protection from accidental and liquid damage. Exclusively available for Malaysian customers.
